steps.title: Pick two points on the line of best fit
steps.content: The line passes through approximately $(24, 10)$ on the left and reaches $y=0$ near $x=34$ on the right.

steps.title: Write the line equation
steps.content:
Slope $= \dfrac{0-10}{34-24} = -1$, and the line passes through $(24,10)$:
$$y = 10 - (x-24)$$

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 32
steps.content:
$$y = 10 - (32 - 24) = 10 - 8 = 2$$
Among the choices, $2$ is closest to choice C. That matches choice C — C is correct.
